bundles.name: AI Security Stack
bundles.tagline: Lock down your AI app top-to-bottom
bundles.description: InjectShield blocks prompt-injection at the perimeter. QueryShield catches dangerous queries at the data layer. ModelWatch keeps every LLM call observable. Three layers, one bundle, 20% off.

bundles.name: Agency Growth Kit
bundles.tagline: Sell more retainers with audits, leads, and compliance
bundles.description: Branded Audits gives every prospect a tangible deliverable. LeadVault feeds your pipeline. ComplianceBeacon adds a recurring revenue line. 15% off the trio.

bundles.name: AI Builder Essentials
bundles.description: AgentFetch for clean web data. InjectShield to handle untrusted text. RegImpact to stay on the right side of the EU AI Act. 15% off.
